competitors.name: Buddy's Pizza (Detroit)
competitors.action: Acquired by Detroit-area investors (Saber Ammori, Andrew Dickow, Kevin Denha) on March 31 with explicit plans to expand frozen pizza offerings nationwide in grocery stores. 80-year Detroit legacy brand entering the frozen aisle as a new premium competitor.
competitors.notes: Another restaurant-to-frozen play — same general playbook as Rao's. Buddy's has deep Detroit-style equity. If they execute on national grocery, they'll compete in the premium 'restaurant pedigree' lane. Real Dough's differentiation: sourdough fermentation story + Wisconsin craft vs. Detroit deep-dish legacy. Watch for their retail launch timeline and which chains they target.

competitors.name: Palermo's Villa (Screamin' Sicilian parent)
competitors.action: Announced new frozen pizza manufacturing plant in Wisconsin to meet surging demand, addressing 2025 supply shortages. Also riding momentum from Chicago Bears 'Holy Cow!' limited-edition partnership that boosted Q1 sales ~15%.
competitors.notes: Palermo's expanding Wisconsin production capacity is directly relevant — they're a Wisconsin neighbor and compete for shelf space in Real Dough's home market. The Bears partnership shows smart sports/cultural marketing. Real Dough should monitor which retailers Palermo's targets with increased supply and whether new capacity means more aggressive shelf placement bids.

competitors.name: Conagra Brands
competitors.action: Q3 FY2026 earnings (reported April 1): Refrigerated & Frozen segment posted 3.6% organic net sales growth to $1.1B. Gained volume share in frozen single-serve meals, vegetables, handhelds. Overall organic net sales +2.4%. Adjusted EPS $0.39 (down 23.5% YoY). Gross margin declined 141bps on COGS inflation.
competitors.notes: Previously reported Conagra's $450M capex commitment (March 30). Today's earnings confirm their frozen bet is working on the top line (+3.6%) but margin pressure is real (141bps gross margin decline). This validates the category-wide ingredient inflation pressure — even a $12B company is feeling it. For Real Dough: Conagra's price/mix increase of 3.7% signals the entire category is pushing prices up, which gives premium brands more room to hold premium pricing without sticker shock.

competitors.name: Katie's Pizza (St. Louis)
competitors.action: Gained significant attention at Natural Products Expo West 2026 (late March) for premium frozen pizza and pasta sauce line. Positioned as high-end restaurant-quality frozen, signaling continued growth of the premium frozen pizza sub-category.
competitors.notes: Another restaurant-to-frozen brand, this time from St. Louis. Expo West buzz is a leading indicator of natural/specialty retail distribution deals. Real Dough should be at Expo West 2027 — it's the #1 venue for getting in front of Whole Foods, Sprouts, and natural grocers' buyers.

trends.topic: Protein-forward positioning becoming dominant CPG macro trend
trends.magnitude: Google Trends 'protein' at record highs in 2026. 62% of consumers likely to order from protein-rich menu sections.
trends.context: Protein density has overtaken calorie count as the primary metric consumers use to evaluate food healthiness. Chipotle launched High Protein Menu across 4,000+ locations. Smoothie King pivoting to 32g protein bowls. This macro trend creates both opportunity and risk for frozen pizza: opportunity if Real Dough can credibly claim protein content (whole-milk mozzarella, real meat toppings), risk if protein-obsessed consumers deprioritize pizza as a category. The Yough Greek yogurt dough play (previously reported) is the most direct expression of this trend in frozen pizza.

trends.topic: Expo West 2026: No sourdough frozen pizza trend visible
trends.magnitude: Zero sourdough frozen pizza entries at the industry's largest natural products trade show
trends.context: Despite sourdough's consumer appeal, no brand other than Dr. Oetker (UK only) is pushing sourdough frozen pizza in natural/specialty channels. Expo West 2026 focused on protein, seed oil-free, fiber, and indulgent-functional. This is actually bullish for Real Dough — the sourdough fermentation story is genuinely differentiated, not yet commoditized. Window of opportunity remains open but won't last forever.

breaking.headline: Buddy's Pizza acquired — new frozen pizza national expansion play
breaking.context: Detroit's 80-year-old Buddy's Pizza acquired by local investors with stated goal of national frozen grocery expansion. Another restaurant brand entering Real Dough's lane.
